DEMURRER
Off Calendar Mar-13-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT DOUGLAS ADAMS' DEMURRER AND MOTION TO STRIKE [Paragraphs IX and X(3)] -- Motion to Strike - Granted. Demurrer - moot, per ruling on motion to strike. 5 days leave to answer. (DAG/301/SL) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, #4780

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Feb-05-2003 Continued To Mar-13-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Thomas E. Drohan, Esq. of LEGAL ASSISTANCE TO THE ELDERLY 861-4444, for defendant Douglas Adams, demurring party

RULING:
Upon request of moving party, the Court continued DEFENDANT DOUGLAS ADAMS' DEMURRER to amended complaint and motion to strike to March 13, 2003. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
